title: Macaw's Modding Legacy
description: This mod is a multi-compatibility for the mods developed by the Modding Legacy. Like Blues Skies or Premium Wood for Macaw's Mods.
body:
This mod is a multi-compatibility for Macaw's Bridges/Fences/Roofs/Furnitures/Stairs and the mods created by Modding Legacy. 
Whether it is Blue Skies or Premium Wood.
The mod will automatically add bridges/roofs or fences with materials from other mods.

_I had installed Macaw's Bridges - Modding Legacy, I am afraid that by installing this mod it will delete all my bridges already placed._

Don't worry, this mod converts all the old blocks and items from the old compatibilitie.

This mod is a unoficial addons of macaw's mods, if mod will be crash and bug please report in this [issue](https://github.com/Samlegamer/Macaw-s-Addons/issues).

This mod supported :

- Macaw's Bridges
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlAXLJxe/images/3e6b98c190c74147efa4377603ed2156c3268982.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlAXLJxe/images/3e6b98c190c74147efa4377603ed2156c3268982.png)

- Macaw's Roofs
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlAXLJxe/images/ca18ca908b4d0833d97abd043d281553cef9d35c.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlAXLJxe/images/ca18ca908b4d0833d97abd043d281553cef9d35c.png)

- Macaw's Fences
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlAXLJxe/images/76f2987709e2d9237fae6f49e44535c58b0e0c35.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlAXLJxe/images/76f2987709e2d9237fae6f49e44535c58b0e0c35.png)

- Macaw's Furnitures
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlAXLJxe/images/54195d33649c49f83d6ab35b693fdbd737fedef0.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlAXLJxe/images/54195d33649c49f83d6ab35b693fdbd737fedef0.png)

- Macaw's Stairs
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlAXLJxe/images/3a23efdd89e87e2257b905bede52c2d39627173a.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlAXLJxe/images/3a23efdd89e87e2257b905bede52c2d39627173a.png)

_**1.1 Update (Trapdoors/Doors/Paths/Windows)**_
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlAXLJxe/images/9d88e3a14dcd027055e8f90866c7dc2b5ca30acf.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlAXLJxe/images/9d88e3a14dcd027055e8f90866c7dc2b5ca30acf.png)

Required Depedency:

[AddonsLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/addonslib)

Optional Dependency:

[Macaw's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw)

[Blue Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies)

[Premium Wood](https://modrinth.com/mod/premium-wood)

[Structure Gel API](https://modrinth.com/mod/structure-gel-api)
